---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "from_bdrhap_to_h5mu"
namespace: "Convert"
description: "Convert the output of a BD Rhapsody pipeline v2.x to a MuData h5 file"
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `from_bdrhap_to_h5mu`  
Namespace: `convert`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/convert/from_bdrhap_to_h5mu)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_bdrhap_to_h5mu)

:::



## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_bdrhap_to_h5mu/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_bdrhap_to_h5mu).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_bdrhap_to_h5mu/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).

## Argument groups

### Arguments

|Name                   |Description                                                                                                    |Attributes                  |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--output_compression` |Compression format to use for the output AnnData and/or Mudata H5 files. By default no compression is applied. |`string`, example: `"gzip"` |


### Inputs

|Name      |Description                                |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--id`    |A sample ID.                               |`string`, required, example: `"my_id"`     |
|`--input` |The output h5mu of a BD Rhapsody workflow. |`file`, required, example: `"sample.h5mu"` |


### Outputs

|Name       |Description       |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--output` |Output h5mu file. |`file`, required, example: `"output.h5mu"` |

## Authors


  * Dorien Roosen [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/dorien-er) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen) (author, maintainer)

  * Robrecht Cannoodt [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/rcannood) [{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3641-729X) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/robrechtcannoodt) (author)
